docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAPPE, M AS TO DEFENDANT DICKINSON, REX SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DICKINSON, REX ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DICKINSON, REX

11:50A.M. DEPARTMENT #2, DENNIS C. HYDE, PRO TEM, NO REPORTER. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT, REX DICKINSON. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL IN FILE. PRIMA FACIE CASE PRESENTED BY PLAINTIFF. THE COURT AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE, ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF M. TAPPE AS AND AGAINST DEFENDANT REX DICKINSON FOR RESTITUTION OF 909 GEARY STREET #316 AND FOR RENT AND DAMAGES OF $1,569.73. ATTORNEY FEES AND COST WAIVED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DICKINSON, REX THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 909 GEARY STREET #316 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,569.73 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,569.73
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DICKINSON, REX
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $15.71. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAPPE, M
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DICKINSON, REX
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAPPE, M COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAY-24-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
